Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER to be done after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that include a subsequent re-submission by the employee
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER compared to the elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in successful paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER after the case reaches Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that eventually lead to Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Payment Handled occurs

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants involving repeated rejections versus first-time rejections
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER and the end of the case

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION, specifically in traces that later include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in rejected-only variants (i.e., those ending without Payment Handled)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER measured from the moment the declaration enters the approval stage until the rejection is recorded
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that also contain Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time until Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER is performed, conditioned on the presence of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER earlier in the trace
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in inconsistent approval-rejection patterns
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'
